revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4.345

Confocal emitters (in Toran)

Fixed stations generating a hyperbolic pattern. The stations are in no way related or synchronized and transmit unmodulated carriers, the frequencies of which differ by a small amount.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Toran Confocal emitters}}
